nameEn: International Conference on High Performance Embedded Architectures and Compilers
description: A European conference on high-performance embedded architectures and compilers, covering embedded processors, compiler optimization, and reconfigurable computing. It is the flagship event of the European HiPEAC network, featuring active industry-academia workshops and corporate sessions.
descriptionKo: 고성능 임베디드 아키텍처와 컴파일러를 다루는 유럽 중심 학회로, 임베디드 프로세서, 컴파일러 최적화, 재구성 가능 컴퓨팅 등을 주제로 한다. 유럽 HiPEAC 네트워크의 핵심 행사이며, 산학 연계 워크숍과 기업 세션이 활발하다.
descriptionEn: A European conference on high-performance embedded architectures and compilers, covering embedded processors, compiler optimization, and reconfigurable computing. It is the flagship event of the European HiPEAC network, featuring active industry-academia workshops and corporate sessions.
